label: L2 — Weather Station
info:
ESZG517 Lab Session L2 — Node-RED path.

SETUP (do this after importing):
  1. Double-click HiveMQ node → enter your broker credentials
  2. Double-click both InfluxDB out nodes → enter your InfluxDB credentials
  3. Click Deploy — HiveMQ node should show 'connected'

DEMO SENSORS (1–5): pre-wired for you — follow the instructor.
YOUR ASSIGNMENT (6–10): complete the Assignment Sensors function node.

SUBMISSION: Menu (☰) → Export → Download → commit to GitHub.

name: Demo Sensors (1–5) ✅
Assignment Sensors (6–10) ⬜ YOUR TASK
